name: Analogical Reasoning Circuit - recurring_3of5
description: Features active in >=3/5 distinct attribution graphs across 5 analogy prompts (Berlin, Rome, Tokyo capital analogies + teacher/bird semantic-role analogies). Gemma-2-2B, gemmascope-transcoder-16k SAE. 490 features at this threshold.
note: appearances = total node instances across all token positions and graphs; distinct_graphs = unique graphs where feature is present
